title: rubus saxosus
intro: Rubus saxosus, also known as the rock raspberry, is a type of wild raspberry plant native to the rocky regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus saxosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
